name: Actuators
description: Pneumatic, servo-pneumatic and electromechanical linear drives and semi-rotary drives for factory automation

sub_categories.name: Pneumatic cylinders
sub_categories.description: Drive components, such as cylinders, linear drives and axes, as well as their attachments and accessories.. Pneumatic drives are intended to convert pressure energy into motion energy; this process involves the transmission and transfer of forces.. Festo was the first manufacturer in Europe to create pneumatic cylinders; our first pneumatic range was created in 1956.

sub_categories.name: Piston rod cylinder
sub_categories.description: Cylinders with piston rods: as compact cylinders, short-stroke cylinders, flat cylinders, round cylinders, miniature cylinders, cartridge cylinders or stainless steel cylinders. Selected types in accordance with the ATEX directive are suitable for explosive atmospheres or are made of corrosion-resistant stainless steel and therefore particularly easy to clean.

sub_categories.name: Round cylinders
sub_categories.description: Cylinders with round or approximately round cylinder barrel and round or approximately round caps.

sub_categories.name: Profile cylinder and tie rod cylinder
sub_categories.description: Cylinder with piston rod in tie rod design and profile design

sub_categories.name: Compact pneumatic cylinders, short-stroke and flat cylinders
sub_categories.description: Cylinders with piston rod, typically with short strokes and optimised installation length.

sub_categories.name: Multimount and pin cylinders
sub_categories.description: Cartridge cylinders: cylinders designed as cartridges that can be directly screwed into a housing (Schott).. Multimount cylinders: cylinders that can be mounted from one or more sides without additional mounting attachments (except for screws).

sub_categories.name: Pneumatic clamp cylinders
sub_categories.description: Standards-based or non-standard-based cylinders with integrated or attached clamping unit or cartridge.

sub_categories.name: Stainless steel pneumatic cylinders
sub_categories.description: Cylinder made of corrosion-resistant stainless steel, and therefore especially easy to clean.

sub_categories.name: Rodless cylinders
sub_categories.description: Space-saving linear drives with or without guide: mechanically coupled cylinders with optimised mounting options for simple mounting and magnetically coupled cylinders for use as a pressure-tight and zero-leakage system.

sub_categories.name: Mechanically coupled pneumatic cylinders
sub_categories.description: Diameter 8, 12, 18, 25, 32, 40, 50, 80 mm. Stroke length 1 ... 8500 mm. Force 30 ... 3016 N. Guide variants. - Standard design. - Plain-bearing guide. - Recirculating ball bearing guide. - Heavy-duty guide

sub_categories.name: Magnetically coupled pneumatic cylinders
sub_categories.description: Diameter 12, 16, 20, 25, 32, 40 mm. Stroke length 10 ... 4000 mm. Force 68 ... 754 N. Guide variant. - Recirculating ball bearing guide

sub_categories.name: Rotary actuators
sub_categories.description: Compact semi-rotary drives with minimum space requirements and adjustable swivel angle, also available as a twin piston rotary drive. Specified types are suitable for potentially explosive atmospheres in accordance with the ATEX directive.

sub_categories.name: Vane drives
sub_categories.description: Sizes 6, 8, 10, 12, 16, 25, 32, 40, 63 mm. Torque: 0.15 ... 80 Nm. Swivel angle 0 ... 270°. Semi-rotary drive with vane as movable component

sub_categories.name: Rack and pinion actuators
sub_categories.description: Size 8, 10, 12, 16, 20, 25, 32, 35, 40, 50, 63 mm. Torque 0.2 ... 112 Nm. Swivel angle 0 ... 180°. Semi-rotary drive up to 180 degrees with rack and pinion

sub_categories.name: Swivel linear actuators
sub_categories.description: Diameter 16, 20, 25, 32, 40 mm. Stroke length 10 ... 200 mm. Swivel angle 0 ... 272°. Torque 1.25 ... 20 Nm. Drives with separately controllable function directions.

sub_categories.name: Tandem, high-force and multi-position cylinders
sub_categories.description: More thrust than conventional cylinders by connecting in series 2, 3 or 4 cylinders with the same piston diameter and the same stroke. . By connecting 2 to 5 cylinders in series with the same piston diameter and different stroke lengths, up to 6 positions can be approached. .

sub_categories.name: Tandem and high-force cylinders
sub_categories.description: Diameter 25, 32, 40, 50, 63, 80, 100, 125 mm. Stroke length 1 ... 500 mm. Force 542 ... 18281 N. More thrust than conventional cylinders by connecting in series 2, 3 or 4 cylinders with the same piston diameter and the same stroke.

sub_categories.name: Multi-position cylinders
sub_categories.description: Diameter 25, 40, 63, 100 mm. Stroke length 1 ... 2000 mm. Force 295 ... 4712 N. By connecting 2 to 5 cylinders in series with the same piston diameter and different stroke lengths, up to 6 positions can be approached.

sub_categories.name: Guided cylinders
sub_categories.description: Drives with slide, rod guides or precise piston rod guide.

sub_categories.name: Drives with slides
sub_categories.description: Diameter 6, 8, 10, 12, 16, 20, 25 mm. Stroke length 5 … 200 mm. Force 17 … 724 N. Recirculating ball bearing guide. Ball bearing cage guide.

sub_categories.name: Drives with guide rods
sub_categories.description: Diameter 10, 16, 25, 32, 50, 80, 100 mm. Stroke length 1 ... 500 mm. Force 31 ... 4712 N. Recirculating ball bearing guide. Plain-bearing guide.

sub_categories.name: Stopper cylinders and feed separators
sub_categories.description: Piston rod cylinder with reinforced piston rod and bearing to withstand large lateral forces.. For stopping or separating when transporting workpiece carriers or pallets – smooth, quiet and safe stopping.

sub_categories.name: Clamping cylinders
sub_categories.description: Compact cylinders without piston rod with diaphragm and a much shorter stroke than bellows cylinders.. Clamping system with pneumatic drive.

sub_categories.description: Compact cylinders without piston rod with diaphragm and a much shorter stroke than bellows cylinders.

sub_categories.name: Swing clamp cylinders

sub_categories.description: Hinge cylinder for clamping components during the welding process

sub_categories.name: Diaphragm actuators
sub_categories.description: Diaphragm drives without piston rod; the design consists of two metal plates with a ribbed rubber bellows or hose.

sub_categories.name: Bellows cylinders
sub_categories.description: Size 80, 100, 145, 165, 215, 250, 325, 385 mm. Stroke length 60 ... 230 mm. Force 0 ... 70000 N. Bellows cylinders drive and pneumatic spring components for harsh, dusty environments or for use under water. Rolling bellows with large stroke range relative to installation height.

sub_categories.name: Pneumatic muscle
sub_categories.description: Sizes 5, 10, 20, 40 mm. Nominal length 30 ... 9000 mm. Lifting force 140 ... 6000 N. Pressed-in connection. Pneumatic actuator without piston rod, with contraction diaphragm, dynamic, powerful, stick-slip-free, single-acting, pulling.. As a tensile actuator modelled on a biological muscle, with almost linear force-stroke characteristics

sub_categories.description: Stroke 1.7 ... 60 mm. Max. energy absorption per stroke 0.005 ... 384 J. Adjustable, self-adjusting cushioning, elastic cushioning rings. Components for cushioning kinetic energy.

sub_categories.name: Servo-pneumatics
sub_categories.description: Systems for positioning, with drives, axis controllers and their accessories.. Servo-pneumatics is most useful in situations that require compact solutions, where moving loads are more than 10 kg and positioning accuracy must be within the range of tenths of a millimetre.

sub_categories.name: Cylinders with displacement encoders
sub_categories.description: Drives with or without piston rod, with attached or integral linear displacement encoder, or angular displacement encoder.

sub_categories.name: Electromechanical actuators
sub_categories.description: With electric drives or electromechanical drive technology, a distinction is made between linear and rotary drives. An electric motor (servo or stepper motor) drives a toothed belt or a spindle, which in turn moves a slide in a linear direction. In the case of rotary drives and modules, the electric motor drives the internal rotary mechanics. The servo or stepper motor is controlled by suitable servo drives.. Linear mechanisms are usually divided into toothed belt and spindle axes, electric cylinders and mini slides.. The guide also plays an important role in distinguishing the type of drive. We usually distinguish between a plain-bearing guide, recirculating ball bearing guide and roller guide.. Typical areas of application for electric drive technology can be found throughout automation technology, especially in flexible linear or rotary positioning.. Electromechanical systems are characterised above all by robustness and rigidity as well as precision and dynamic response.. For example, linear mechanical systems achieve speeds of up to 10 m/s, accelerations of up to 50 m/s² and a repetition accuracy of +/– 15 µm. Strokes of up to 8.5 m are available as standard.. The design of electric drives makes them rigid and virtually unyielding.

name: Sensors
description: Sensors and monitoring devices and their accessories.

sub_categories.name: Cylinder sensors
sub_categories.description: Festo proximity sensors are especially designed and optimised for Festo drives. They detect the magnetic field of permanent magnets built into the piston of the cylinder, thus indirectly indicating the position of the piston rod. . The available range covers freely configurable proximity sensors, modular systems, and solutions for special applications such as explosion protection, acids, food, cooling lubricants, weld field, etc.

sub_categories.name: T-slot cylinder sensors
sub_categories.description: Voltage 0 ... 250 V DC, 230 V AC. Cable length 0.3, 2.5, 5, 7.5, 0.2 ... 10 m. Connection: plug M8, M12/female thread M5. Electric. - With reed contact. - Non-contacting PNP, NPN. Pneumatic.

sub_categories.name: C-slot cylinder sensors
sub_categories.description: Voltage 0 ... 250 V DC, 230 V AC. Connection plug M8, M12. Electric. - With reed contact. - Non-contacting PNP, NPN.

sub_categories.name: Cylinder sensors block design
sub_categories.description: Voltage 0 ... 250 V DC, 230 V AC. Cable length 2.5, 5 m. Connection plug M8, M12. Electric. - With reed contact. - Non-contacting PNP, NPN. Pneumatic.

sub_categories.name: Cylinder signal generators
sub_categories.description: Operating pressure range 1 ... 8 bar. Poppet valve design. Barbed fitting for 3 mm I.D. plastic tubing. Pneumatic

sub_categories.name: Inductive proximity switches
sub_categories.description: The sensors series SIE... keeps a close eye on all metals, with functions ranging from sensing to distance measurement of metallic objects.

sub_categories.name: Position sensors
sub_categories.description: Position sensors detect the movement of drives in automated systems and are crucial for the efficiency and accuracy of industrial processes.

sub_categories.name: Position transmitters
sub_categories.description: Position transmitters continuously and contactlessly record the piston movement and transmit this information as analogue or digital values.

sub_categories.name: Position sensors for rotary drives
sub_categories.description: With position sensors for rotary drives, the end position can be precisely detected and the information is transmitted via two switching outputs.

sub_categories.name: Position sensors for grippers
sub_categories.description: Position sensors for grippers enable the end position to be precisely detected and they then transmit the information about the gripping status.

sub_categories.name: Displacement encoders
sub_categories.description: Position sensors for grippers enable the end position to be precisely detected and they then transmit the information about the gripping status.

sub_categories.name: Pressure and vacuum sensors
sub_categories.description: Pressure sensors and vacuum switches for monitoring all pressure values: programmable, or as a modular product.

sub_categories.name: Flow sensors
sub_categories.description: By monitoring the flow, simplified diagnostic and condition monitoring processes can be implemented; a change in the flow rate is often an indication that problems are likely to occur. The quality of the final product can also be monitored.

sub_categories.name: Optical sensors
sub_categories.description: With their optical measuring techniques, the sensors in the SOE... series cover a wide variety of tasks, from recognising colours and tiny parts through to laser distance sensing. All perfectly matched with products and services from Festo.

sub_categories.name: Signal converters
sub_categories.description: The signal converter SVE4 converts the analogue output signal from a sensor into switching points that can be taught in directly on the signal converter. Ideal anywhere where the accessibility of sensors is restricted.

sub_categories.name: Limit switch attachments
sub_categories.description: Digital and analogue limit switch boxes with optical display for semi-rotary drives in standard and potentially explosive atmospheres.

sub_categories.name: Classic
sub_categories.description: Product types for which modern alternatives are now available.

sub_categories.name: Air gap sensors
sub_categories.description: Pneumatic sensors are contactless signal generators. They are especially suitable for end-position sensing and position monitoring where high accuracy is required. Small dimensions allow them to be used in hard-to-access positions, at a wide range of ambient temperatures and in situations with high levels of dirt.

sub_categories.name: Accessories
sub_categories.description: Extensive range of accessories for every application.. - Mounting kits. - Sensor brackets. - Clips. - Positioning element

name: Function-specific systems
description: Function-specific systems always consist of application software, a controller, and selected and suitable hardware. These systems are always associated with a type of joining technology and are highly application-specific.

sub_categories.name: Servo press systems
sub_categories.description: In production engineering, joining refers to several different production methods whereby two or more solid workpieces are connected, i.e. joined, with a geometrically defined shape. Examples include pressing, welding, soldering, brazing and gluing.
